results.question: Show all students
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT *
FROM students;

results.question: List all courses
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT *
FROM courses;
results.system_sql: SELECT id, code, title, credits FROM courses;

results.question: Top scoring student
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT *
FROM students
ORDER BY score DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.system_sql: SELECT s.name FROM students s INNER JOIN scores sc ON s.id = sc.student_id ORDER BY sc.marks DESC LIMIT 1;

results.question: Show student name with course and marks
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT 
    s.student_name, 
    c.course_name, 
    m.marks
FROM 
    students s
JOIN 
    course c ON s.course_id = c.course_id
JOIN 
    marks m ON s.student_id = m.student_id;
results.system_sql:
SELECT s.name, c.title, sc.marks 
FROM students s 
JOIN scores sc ON s.id = sc.student_id 
JOIN courses c ON sc.course_id = c.id;

results.question: List students and their courses
results.system_sql:
SELECT s.name, c.title 
FROM students s 
JOIN scores sc ON s.id = sc.student_id 
JOIN courses c ON sc.course_id = c.id;

results.question: Average marks per student
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT 
    student_name, 
    AVG(marks) AS average_marks
FROM 
    student_marks
GROUP BY 
    student_name;
results.system_sql: SELECT name, AVG(marks) FROM students INNER JOIN scores ON students.id = scores.student_id GROUP BY students.id;

results.question: Top 3 students by marks
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT name, marks
FROM students
ORDER BY marks DESC
LIMIT 3;
results.system_sql:
SELECT s.name, SUM(sc.marks) AS total_marks 
FROM scores sc 
JOIN students s ON sc.student_id = s.id 
GROUP BY s.name 
ORDER BY total_marks DESC 
LIMIT 3;

results.question: student_name instead of name
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT student_name AS name
FROM students;
results.system_sql: SELECT students.name AS student_name FROM students;

results.question: student_scores instead of scores
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT student_scores
FROM table_name;
results.system_sql:
SELECT s.id, s.name, c.code, c.title, sc.marks, sc.exam_date 
FROM students s 
JOIN scores sc ON s.id = sc.student_id 
JOIN courses c ON sc.course_id = c.id;

results.question: Top performer
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT 
  employee_name, 
  department, 
  SUM(salary) AS total_salary, 
  COUNT(*) AS total_projects
FROM 
  employees
GROUP BY 
  employee_name, 
  department
ORDER BY 
  total_salary DESC;

results.question: List student emails with course names and marks above average
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT s.email, c.name, m.mark
FROM students s
JOIN marks m ON s.id = m.student_id
JOIN courses c ON m.course_id = c.id
WHERE m.mark > (SELECT AVG(m2.mark) FROM marks m2 WHERE m2.course_id = m.course_id);
results.system_error: SQL generation failed: Groq request failed. Check network, API key, and model name.

results.question: Students who performed better than average in each course
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT 
  c.name AS course_name,
  s.student_id,
  s.name AS student_name,
  AVG(m.score) AS average_score,
  m.score AS student_score
FROM 
  students s
  JOIN marks m ON s.student_id = m.student_id
  JOIN courses c ON m.course_id = c.course_id
GROUP BY 
  c.name, s.student_id, s.name, m.score
HAVING 
  m.score > (SELECT AVG(score) FROM marks WHERE course_id = c.course_id)
ORDER BY 
  c.name, s.student_id;
results.system_error: SQL generation failed: Groq request failed. Check network, API key, and model name.

results.question: Find students who scored above average in at least 2 courses
results.baseline_sql:
SELECT s.*
FROM students s
JOIN (
  SELECT student_id, AVG(score) AS avg_score
  FROM scores
  GROUP BY student_id
) AS avg_scores
ON s.student_id = avg_scores.student_id
WHERE s.student_id IN (
  SELECT student_id
  FROM scores
  GROUP BY student_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND AVG(score) > (SELECT avg_score FROM avg_scores)
);
results.system_error: SQL generation failed: Groq request failed. Check network, API key, and model name.

results.question: Top department based on average marks
results.baseline_sql:

FROM students
GROUP BY department
ORDER BY average_marks DESC
LIMIT 1;
